targets.rawSql:
SELECT countDistinct(strategy_id) AS `Stratégies actives` FROM prediction_core.profile_metrics WHERE $__timeFilter(observed_at)
  AND match(run_id, '${run_id:regex}')
  AND match(strategy_id, '${strategy:regex}')
  AND match(profile_id, '${profile:regex}')
  AND match(mode, '${mode:regex}')
  AND (
    '${business_time}' = 'all'
    OR ('${business_time}' = 'business_hours' AND toHour(observed_at) BETWEEN 13 AND 21)
    OR ('${business_time}' = 'off_hours' AND NOT (toHour(observed_at) BETWEEN 13 AND 21))
  )
SELECT countDistinct(strategy_id) AS `Stratégies live` FROM prediction_core.execution_events WHERE $__timeFilter(observed_at) AND (mode = 'live' OR live_order_allowed)
SELECT countDistinct(strategy_id) AS `Stratégies paper` FROM prediction_core.profile_decisions WHERE $__timeFilter(observed_at) AND (mode = 'paper' OR paper_only)

SELECT count() AS `Stratégies stale` FROM (SELECT strategy_id, dateDiff('minute', max(observed_at), now()) AS age_minutes FROM prediction_core.profile_metrics GROUP BY strategy_id) WHERE age_minutes > 60

WITH metrics AS
(
  SELECT
    strategy_id,
    groupUniqArray(profile_id) AS profiles,
    anyLast(mode) AS mode,
    max(observed_at) AS last_observed_at,
    dateDiff('minute', max(observed_at), now()) AS age_minutes,
    sum(decision_count) AS decisions,
    sum(trade_count) AS trades,
    sum(skip_count) AS skips,
    sum(skip_count) / nullIf(sum(decision_count), 0) AS skip_rate,
    sum(net_pnl_usdc) AS net_pnl_usdc,
    avg(roi) AS roi,
    sum(exposure_usdc) AS exposure_usdc
  FROM prediction_core.profile_metrics
  WHERE $__timeFilter(observed_at)
    AND match(run_id, '${run_id:regex}')
  AND match(strategy_id, '${strategy:regex}')
  AND match(profile_id, '${profile:regex}')
  AND match(mode, '${mode:regex}')
  AND (
    '${business_time}' = 'all'
    OR ('${business_time}' = 'business_hours' AND toHour(observed_at) BETWEEN 13 AND 21)
    OR ('${business_time}' = 'off_hours' AND NOT (toHour(observed_at) BETWEEN 13 AND 21))
  )
  GROUP BY strategy_id
), live AS
(
  SELECT strategy_id, max(live_order_allowed OR mode = 'live') AS live_seen
  FROM prediction_core.execution_events
  WHERE $__timeFilter(observed_at)
  GROUP BY strategy_id
), blockers AS
(
  SELECT strategy_id, countIf(blocker != '' OR skip_reason != '') AS blocker_count
  FROM prediction_core.debug_decisions
  WHERE $__timeFilter(observed_at)
  GROUP BY strategy_id
)
SELECT
  metrics.strategy_id AS `Stratégie`,
  arrayStringConcat(metrics.profiles, ', ') AS `Profils`,
  metrics.mode AS `Mode détecté`,
  metrics.last_observed_at AS `Dernier observed_at`,
  metrics.age_minutes AS `Âge minutes`,
  metrics.decisions AS `Décisions`,
  metrics.trades AS `Trades`,
  metrics.skips AS `Skips`,
  metrics.skip_rate AS `Taux de skip`,
  metrics.net_pnl_usdc AS `PnL net`,
  metrics.roi AS `ROI`,
  metrics.exposure_usdc AS `Exposition`,
  ifNull(live.live_seen, 0) AS `Live allowed/seen`,
  multiIf(metrics.decisions = 0, 'NO_DATA', metrics.age_minutes > 60, 'STALE', ifNull(live.live_seen, 0), 'LIVE_ACTIVE', ifNull(blockers.blocker_count, 0) > 0 OR metrics.skip_rate > 0.8, 'DEGRADED', metrics.mode = 'paper', 'PAPER_ONLY', 'OK') AS `Statut santé`
FROM metrics
LEFT JOIN live ON metrics.strategy_id = live.strategy_id
LEFT JOIN blockers ON metrics.strategy_id = blockers.strategy_id
ORDER BY `PnL net` DESC

SELECT strategy_id AS `Stratégie`, profile_id AS `Profil`, sum(net_pnl_usdc) AS `PnL net`, avg(roi) AS `ROI`, sum(trade_count) AS `Trades`, sum(skip_count) / nullIf(sum(decision_count), 0) AS `Taux de skip`, (100 * ifNull(avg(roi), 0) + 5 * log10(1 + greatest(sum(trade_count), 0)) - 20 * ifNull(sum(skip_count) / nullIf(sum(decision_count), 0), 0)) AS `Score` FROM prediction_core.profile_metrics WHERE $__timeFilter(observed_at)
  AND match(run_id, '${run_id:regex}')
  AND match(strategy_id, '${strategy:regex}')
  AND match(profile_id, '${profile:regex}')
  AND match(mode, '${mode:regex}')
  AND (
    '${business_time}' = 'all'
    OR ('${business_time}' = 'business_hours' AND toHour(observed_at) BETWEEN 13 AND 21)
    OR ('${business_time}' = 'off_hours' AND NOT (toHour(observed_at) BETWEEN 13 AND 21))
  ) GROUP BY strategy_id, profile_id ORDER BY `Score` DESC

SELECT strategy_id AS `Stratégie`, mode AS `Mode`, paper_only AS `Paper only`, live_order_allowed AS `Live allowed`, count() AS `Événements` FROM prediction_core.profile_decisions WHERE $__timeFilter(observed_at) GROUP BY strategy_id, mode, paper_only, live_order_allowed ORDER BY `Événements` DESC

SELECT strategy_id AS `Stratégie`, if(blocker = '', skip_reason, blocker) AS `Blocker`, count() AS `Nombre` FROM prediction_core.debug_decisions WHERE $__timeFilter(observed_at) AND (blocker != '' OR skip_reason != '') GROUP BY strategy_id, `Blocker` ORDER BY `Nombre` DESC LIMIT 50

SELECT strategy_id AS `Stratégie`, count() AS `Signaux`, max(observed_at) AS `Dernier signal` FROM prediction_core.strategy_signals WHERE $__timeFilter(observed_at) GROUP BY strategy_id ORDER BY `Signaux` DESC

list.definition: SELECT DISTINCT run_id FROM prediction_core.profile_metrics WHERE run_id != '' ORDER BY run_id
list.label: Run
list.name: run_id
list.query: SELECT DISTINCT run_id FROM prediction_core.profile_metrics WHERE run_id != '' ORDER BY run_id
